tells: Perfectly uniform brushed-aluminum with a synthetic anisotropic sheen and a too-clean rim highlight that reads as a procedural metal shader
Ground plane is a flat gradient with no real surface grain or environmental reflections, typical of a studio HDRI backdrop in a 3D scene
Port cutouts and speaker grille are geometrically flawless with zero machining marks, dust, or fingerprint contamination
The speckled panel is displacement/noise-mapped geometry, not a real foam or metal texture — the grain tiles unnaturally and has no coherent depth
Impossible product: gold chassis with random noise-fill face and blank oval recesses is a concept, not a manufacturable device
Reflected shadow and floor gradient are pure CG studio lighting with no lens dust, vignetting, or real-world surface detail
